title: Virtuso's Grand Battle
description: Adds an illager boss to the later stages of raids
body:
Adds a Boss that shows up in later stages of Raids.
(Boss Is Mostly Complete [Probably will add some new Anims to make the Boss more Lively and intimidating] but items and bug fixes will come with time and criticism).
Geckolib is needed cause im too lazy to do it without it.
